Class
Description
AdminGUI
 
AdminVoteConfirmation
 
AdminVoteHelp
 
AdminVoteLogEventSelect
Admin GUI: Select an event filter, then open AdminVoteLogRecent (filtered).
AdminVoteLogHelpers
 
AdminVoteLogMenu
 
AdminVoteLogPlayer
Admin GUI: VoteLog entries for a given player (paged).
AdminVoteLogPlayerSelect
Admin GUI: Select an ONLINE player, then open AdminVoteLogPlayer.
AdminVoteLogPlayerSelectOnline
Admin GUI: Select an ONLINE player, then open AdminVoteLogPlayer.
AdminVoteLogRecent
Admin GUI: Recent VoteLog entries (paged).
AdminVoteLogServer
Admin GUI: VoteLog entries for a given server (paged).
AdminVoteLogServerSelect
Admin GUI: Select a server (distinct list), then open AdminVoteLogServer.
AdminVoteLogService
Admin GUI: VoteLog entries for a given service/site (paged).
AdminVoteLogServiceSelect
Admin GUI: Select a service (distinct list), then open AdminVoteLogService.
AdminVoteLogServiceSelectAll
Admin GUI: Select a service from DB (distinct services), then open AdminVoteLogService.
AdminVoteLogStats
Admin GUI: VoteLog stats overview.
AdminVoteLogVoteId
Admin GUI: VoteLog entries for a given voteId (paged).

AliasCommandFilterListener
Filters VotingPlugin command aliases from tab completion when aliases are disabled.
AliasesTabCompleter
The Class AliasesTabCompleter.
AtMatcher
Supports: - At: 0 - At: 50 - At: [20, 50, 100] - At: - 10..200 step 10 - 250 Stateless evaluation: matches based solely on newTotal.
BlockBreak
The Class BlockBreak.
BroadcastFormat
Defines HOW vote broadcasts are rendered.
BroadcastHandler
Core broadcast logic.
BroadcastSettings
Immutable broadcast configuration.
BStatsMetricsBungee
bStats collects some data for plugin authors.
BStatsMetricsBungee.AdvancedBarChart
Represents a custom advanced bar chart.
BStatsMetricsBungee.AdvancedPie
Represents a custom advanced pie.
BStatsMetricsBungee.CustomChart
Represents a custom chart.
BStatsMetricsBungee.DrilldownPie
Represents a custom drilldown pie.
BStatsMetricsBungee.MultiLineChart
Represents a custom multi line chart.
BStatsMetricsBungee.SimpleBarChart
Represents a custom simple bar chart.
BStatsMetricsBungee.SimplePie
Represents a custom simple pie.
BStatsMetricsBungee.SingleLineChart
Represents a custom single line chart.

UserDataVoteReminderCooldownStore
Uses VotingPluginUser.getUserData() cached columns: - VoteRemindersLast (BIGINT) - VoteRemindersMap (LONGTEXT) format: name=ms;name=ms NOTE: tryClaimGlobal is best-effort and not proxy-atomic unless your storage layer supports conditional updates.

VoteLogMysqlTable
Vote log table usable from BOTH proxy and backend.
VoteLogMysqlTable.ServerCount
 
VoteLogMysqlTable.ServiceCount
 
VoteLogMysqlTable.VoteLogCounts
 
VoteLogMysqlTable.VoteLogEntry

VoteMilestone
Represents a single VoteMilestone entry.
VoteMilestoneGroupParser
 
VoteMilestoneGroupSelect
 
VoteMilestoneLimit
Per-milestone retrigger limiter.
VoteMilestoneLimit.Type
 
VoteMilestoneRewardEvent
Fired after a VoteMilestone reward has been executed successfully.
VoteMilestonesConfig
 
VoteMilestonesManager
Evaluates VoteMilestones on each vote.
VoteMilestonesMigrator
Legacy migration: - Uses SpecialRewards.yml root as the reward container so reward paths can be absolute. - FirstVote / FirstVoteToday: rewards are on the section itself (no "Rewards" child) - Cumulative / MileStones: rewards are under "...Rewards" - Totals are mapped into VoteMilestoneTotal (votes + points + legacy counter) Adds per-milestone Limit support (default NONE).
VoteMilestoneTotal
Defines what numeric value a VoteMilestone evaluates against.
VoteMilestoneVoteLogListener
Logs VoteMilestone reward executions to the VoteLog table.
VoteNext
 
VoteParty
The Class VoteParty.

The Class PlayerVoteEvent.

VotingPluginVelocityCommand
 
VotingPluginWebhooks
Convenience wrapper to manage webhook lifecycle within VotingPlugin.
VotingPluginWire
Canonical wire format for proxy - backend messages.
VotingPluginWire.Vote
 
VotingPluginWire.VoteUpdate
 
WebhookConfigLoader
Loads webhook definitions from VotingPlugin's Config.yml section.
WebhookDefinition
Webhook endpoint definition.
WebhookHttpMethod
Supported HTTP methods for webhook requests.
WebhookLogger
Logging abstraction for the webhook subsystem.
WebhookRequest
A queued webhook request.
WebhookRewardEntry
Represents one webhook entry under a reward's "Webhooks:" list.
WebhookRewardExecutor
Executes webhook rewards using configured definitions.
WebhookRewardParser
Parses reward "Webhooks:" entries from a Bukkit ConfigurationSection.
WebhookService
Asynchronous webhook dispatcher.
WebhookSignatureConfig
Signature configuration used to sign webhook payloads for verification by the receiver.
WebhookSigner
Signs webhook payloads for receiver verification.
